series_metadata.series_description: Case files of employees coved under the Americans with Disabilities Act and Reasonable Accommodation guidelines. Records Include letters requesting reasonable accommodation with respect to parking, facilities, and equipment needed to perform their job, and personal medical information documenting their ADA qualification.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 7 years then destroy. ; Paper: Retain in office 7 years then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
